prompts.name: attach-and-orient
prompts.description: Attach to a live user-mode process and gather orientation.

prompts.name: find-who-wrote
prompts.description: Find which thread wrote to a given address.

prompts.name: inspect-object
prompts.description: Inspect a typed object in memory and follow one pointer level.

prompts.name: kernel-attach-kdnet
prompts.description: Attach to a Windows kernel target over KDNET and orient.

prompts.name: triage-dump
prompts.description: Step-by-step triage of an unfamiliar crash dump.

arguments.name: dump_path
arguments.description: Absolute path to the .dmp file on the debugger host.

prompts.name: why-blocked
prompts.description: Diagnose why a thread is blocked.

arguments.name: thread_id
arguments.description: System thread ID. Defaults to the current thread.
